title: Sara Blakely
text:
PROFILE

# Sara Blakely

Founder, Spanx

$1.3B

### Real Time Net Worth

as of 4/22/26

Reflects change since 5 pm ET of prior trading day.

[\ in the world today](https://www.forbes.com/real-time-billionaires/)

   

Photo by Jamel Toppin for Forbes

From the Editor

## Last Updated Mar 10, 2026, 1:01am EDT

* Sara Blakely is the founder and part owner of shapewear brand Spanx, which sells undergarments, leggings and apparel.
* In late 2021, Blackstone bought a majority stake in Spanx in a deal that valued the company at $1.2 billion.
* In August 2024, Blakely launched Sneex, a line of high-heeled sneakers priced at $395 and up that she designed to be comfortable.
* A onetime door-to-door fax machine salesperson, Blakely first created Spanx using pantyhose to wear under white slacks.
* While Spanx is a celebrity favorite, Blakely is becoming a celebrity herself. She was a guest judge on 'Shark Tank' and had a cameo in 'Billions.'

Did you know

Blakely's husband Jessie Itzler is the founder of private jet membership company Marquis Jets, which was acquired by NetJets in 2010 for an undisclosed sum.

Blakely owns a minority stake in the Atlanta Hawks, her local NBA team.

In Their Own Words

> I did not have the most experience in the industry or the most money, but I cared the most.
> 
> Sara Blakely

[### 2025 Forbes Power Women's Summit | The Optimist: Betting On The Founder Within](https://www.forbes.com/video/2df5300f-3dca-4ae1-8b30-81b9d18278b1/)

At the 2025 Forbes Power Women's Summit, Sara Blakely, Founder, Spanx & Sneex speaks with President and Publisher of Forbes Women, Moira Forbes about betting on herself as a founder.
Sara Blakely is the founder of Spanx and Sneex. She is an inventor, a category creator and an industry disruptor who asks for signs from the Universe… and gets them. She is an intuitive brand expert who can embody the heart and mind of the consumer through putting herself in their shoes… literally. She spends an unusual amount of time daydreaming in her car, sometimes just parked in driveway. She’s a seeker of ideas who has spent her life building the courage and mindset to pursue them. She may be a legendary entrepreneur, but she doesn’t take herself too seriously and she believes it’s her calling to support and elevate women.

By [Kristin Hunt](https://www.forbes.com/sites/khunt/) Former Staff

[](https://www.facebook.com/dialog/feed?app_id=123694841080850&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F2df5300f-3dca-4ae1-8b30-81b9d18278b1%2F&picture=https%3A%2F%2Fimg.connatix.com%2F2df5300f-3dca-4ae1-8b30-81b9d18278b1%2F5_th.jpg&name=2025%20Forbes%20Power%20Women's%20Summit%20%7C%20The%20Optimist%3A%20Betting%20On%20The%20Founder%20Within&caption=www.forbes.com&description=At%20the%202025%20Forbes%20Power%20Women's%20Summit%2C%20Sara%20Blakely%2C%20Founder%2C%20Spanx%20%26%20Sneex%20speaks%20with%20President%20and%20Publisher%20of%20Forbes%20Women%2C%20Moira%20Forbes%20about%20betting%20on%20herself%20as%20a%20founder.%0A%0ASara%20Blakely%20is%20the%20founder%20of%20Spanx%20and%20Sneex.%20She%20is%20an%20inventor%2C%20a%20category%20creator%20and%20an%20industry%20disruptor%20who%20asks%20for%20signs%20from%20the%20Universe%E2%80%A6%20and%20gets%20them.%20She%20is%20an%20intuitive%20brand%20expert%20who%20can%20embody%20the%20heart%20and%20mind%20of%20the%20consumer%20through%20putting%20herself%20in%20their%20shoes%E2%80%A6%20literally.%20She%20spends%20an%20unusual%20amount%20of%20time%20daydreaming%20in%20her%20car%2C%20sometimes%20just%20parked%20in%20driveway.%20She%E2%80%99s%20a%20seeker%20of%20ideas%20who%20has%20spent%20her%20life%20building%20the%20courage%20and%20mindset%20to%20pursue%20them.%20She%20may%20be%20a%20legendary%20entrepreneur%2C%20but%20she%20doesn%E2%80%99t%20take%20herself%20too%20seriously%20and%20she%20believes%20it%E2%80%99s%20her%20calling%20to%20support%20and%20elevate%20women.) [](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F2df5300f-3dca-4ae1-8b30-81b9d18278b1%2F&via=forbes&text=2025%20Forbes%20Power%20Women's%20Summit%20%7C%20The%20Optimist%3A%20Betting%20On%20The%20Founder%20Within) [](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F2df5300f-3dca-4ae1-8b30-81b9d18278b1%2F&title=2025%20Forbes%20Power%20Women's%20Summit%20%7C%20The%20Optimist%3A%20Betting%20On%20The%20Founder%20Within&summary=At%20the%202025%20Forbes%20Power%20Women's%20Summit%2C%20Sara%20Blakely%2C%20Founder%2C%20Spanx%20%26%20Sneex%20speaks%20with%20President%20and%20Publisher%20of%20Forbes%20Women%2C%20Moira%20Forbes%20about%20betting%20on%20herself%20as%20a%20founder.%0A%0ASara%20Blakely%20is%20the%20founder%20of%20Spanx%20and%20Sneex.%20She%20is%20an%20inventor%2C%20a%20category%20creator%20and%20an%20industry%20disruptor%20who%20asks%20for%20signs%20from%20the%20Universe%E2%80%A6%20and%20gets%20them.%20She%20is%20an%20intuitive%20brand%20expert%20who%20can%20embody%20the%20heart%20and%20mind%20of%20the%20consumer%20through%20putting%20herself%20in%20their%20shoes%E2%80%A6%20literally.%20She%20spends%20an%20unusual%20amount%20of%20time%20daydreaming%20in%20her%20car%2C%20sometimes%20just%20parked%20in%20driveway.%20She%E2%80%99s%20a%20seeker%20of%20ideas%20who%20has%20spent%20her%20life%20building%20the%20courage%20and%20mindset%20to%20pursue%20them.%20She%20may%20be%20a%20legendary%20entrepreneur%2C%20but%20she%20doesn%E2%80%99t%20take%20herself%20too%20seriously%20and%20she%20believes%20it%E2%80%99s%20her%20calling%20to%20support%20and%20elevate%20women.)

[### Time Management Hacks From The World’s Most Successful Leaders](https://www.forbes.com/sites/jodiecook/2024/09/18/time-management-hacks-from-the-worlds-most-successful-leaders/)

Take control, have intention, and do more with your week. Here's how top leaders including Sara Blakely, Jeff Bezos and Warren Buffet manage their time for success.

[### Sara Blakely Teaches Us How To Turn A Fear Of Public Speaking Into A Superpower](https://www.forbes.com/sites/janehanson/2023/08/07/how-to-turn-your-fear-of-public-speaking-into-a-superpower/)

Spanx founder Sara Blakely recently posted that she gets pre-presentation jitters. So, it makes sense that we do too. Here are tips to turn those fears into a superpower.

By [Jane Hanson](https://www.forbes.com/sites/janehanson/) Contributor
